raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tas Wihna-Kohks
fazzija us teem : Wuj buhṣ man
mannu Wihnu atstaht/ kas Dee-
wus un Zilwekus eepreezina/ un
no-eet/ un lihgotees pa Kohko
Wirfu?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazztja wiṣi tee Koh-
ki us to Ehrfschku Kruhnim: Nahz
tu/ uneffi Kehntisch pahr mums.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tas Ehrfschku-
Kruhnis us teem Kohkeew/ kad
juhs teefscham mann par Kehntxu
pahr jums fwaidat/ tad nahzeet/
un ustizzajtees appakṣh mannu
Paehnn/ bet ja ne/ tad laid iseet
Ugguns no ta Ehrfschku-Kruh-
ma/ un norihj ta Lihbanus Zee-
dra-Kohkus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un uu/ effat juhs taifni
un pareifi darrijschi/ ka juhs to
Abimeleku effat par Kehninu ee-
zehluschi/ un effat juhs labdarrij-
schi pee Jerub-Baäla un winna
Naina/ un winnam pehz winna
RohkuNopelnischannas darrijschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo mans Tehws irr juhsu
deht karrojs/ un fawu Dshwi-
bu tahtu nomettis/ un juhs no to
Midijaniteru Rohkas ieglahbis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet juhs effat prett man-
na Tehwa Namina schodeen zeh-
lutchees/ un winna Dehlus sep-
tindefinits Wihrus us weenu Ak-
mint nokawuschi/ un effat Abi-
meleku winna Kalpones Dehlu/
par Kehninu eezehluschi pahr teem
Namneekem no Sikeema/tapehz
ka winsh juhtu Brahls irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Effat juhs uu taifni n
pareisi pee Jerub-Baalä un pe-
winnä Nanna schodeen-darrijs-
schi/ tad preezajtees pahr Abi-
meleku/ un laid winsh arridsa-
pahr jums preezajahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet ja ne/ tad lai Uggun-
islezz no Abimeleka/ un noh-
rihj tohs Namneekus no Sike-
ma/ un to Namnu Milkus/ uu-
lai Uggunis islezz no teem Nam-
nekeem no Sikeema/ un no te-
Namna Millus/ un norihj Abi-
meleku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad behdse Jotams/ uu-
aisbehdse us Beru/ un dshiwaj-
tur preeksch fawu Brahli Abi-
meleku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad uu Abimeleks trih-
Gaddus pahr Israëlu bij waldijs
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fuhtija Deeus wee-
nu taunu Prahtu starp Abime-
leku un starp teem Namneekem
no Sikeema/ un tee Namneek-
no Sikeematurrejahs wiltigi pre-
Abimeleku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka ta Blehdiba nahktu
kas pee teem feptindefinits Jerub-
Baäla Dehleem (darrita)/ uu-
winna Ahins us Abimeleku win-
no Brahli atgreestohs/ kas toh-
bij nokawis/ un us teem Namne-
keem no Sikeema/ kas win-
Rohkas bij stiprinajschi faw-
Brahli nokaut.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee Namneeki no Si-
kema fuhtija kahdus/ kas ar Wi-
tu us winnu gluheja us to Ka-
nu Wirs-Galfeent/ un tee apla-
ptja wiffus/ kas us to Zeltu fe-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
